description: Stable exact-asset reference contracts. Paths locate private audio; IDs and canonical digests own identity. Unverified contracts are inventory only and cannot run.

corpora.name: Repository equation-owned loop pilot
corpora.notes: Deterministic synthetic audio generated from repository-owned equations; never human/reference-corpus evidence.

corpora.name: Salamander Grand Piano V3 candidate mapping
corpora.notes: Collection license is verified, but legacy case filenames do not commit exact source-layer/canonicalization receipts.
corpora.reason: Exact source asset identity and canonical recipe are not committed per case.

corpora.name: Legacy mixed acoustic-drum case paths
corpora.notes: Legacy drumkit paths can mix Virtuosity, DRSKit, MuldjordKit, Naked Drums, or other material.
corpora.reason: Source family, license, microphone role, and canonical digest are ambiguous.

corpora.name: Legacy mixed guitar case paths
corpora.notes: Legacy paths can conflate NSynth and FreePats/other sources, especially distorted guitar.
corpora.reason: Exact source example and canonical digest are not committed per case.

corpora.name: Legacy mixed bass case paths
corpora.notes: Legacy paths conflict between NSynth labels and Karoryfer/FreePats campaign sources.
corpora.reason: Exact source example and canonical digest are not committed per case.

corpora.name: A43 original Roland TR-808 isolated voices, Freesound pack 532
corpora.notes: Issue #29 owns exact corrected canonical digests; sources are edited lossy previews with voice-specific invalid axes.
